description: Control Govee smart lights — colors, brightness, scenes, auto-play playlists.

govee.description: Govee light control CLI: list / on / off / color / brightness / temperature / scene / state / colors / scenes.

args.name: subcommand
args.description: list, on, off, color, brightness, temperature, scene, state, colors, scenes
Subcommand arguments — see SKILL.md for the full reference

auto-play.description: DIY scene rotation: advance/--status/--reset/--list a playlist of scenes.

args.name: playlist-path
args.description: Path to a playlist JSON (relative paths resolve under SKILL_DIR, absolute paths used as-is)

args.name: --status | --reset | --list
args.description: Optional subcommand. Default action is to advance to the next scene.
